channel.title: Sql on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Sql on Frank Huang

item.title: SQL syntax memo
item.description: insert INSERT INTO table_name (col1 ... ) values (value1,...) INSERT INTO table_name SELECT col1,... from table_name WHERE ... update

item.title: New features in PostgreSQL 10
item.description: Support common table expression(CTE) Example: With tablename1(col1, col2) as ( select * from tablename ), tablename2(col1, col2) as ( select * from tablename ) select * from tablename1 inner join tablename2 where col1 == col2

item.title: postgresql command note
item.description: Initial login to postgresql: psql -U demo -p 15432 -d database -h host list databases in postgresql: psql -l backup database: PGPASSWORD="password" pg_dump -h host -p port -U username database > file.sql or PGPASSWORD="password" pg_dump -h host -p port -U username -t tablename database > file.sql for only one table. recommended way to dumnp database: pg_dump -Fc mydb > db.dump restore database: psql -U postgres database < file.
